q1.question: How much does it cost to register on Just-Tag?
q1.answer: We offer 3 plans (monthly, semi-annual, annual) with a launch rate starting at CHF 24.90/month for the first 100 registered restaurants. Standard rates apply thereafter. A lifetime offer at CHF 1,495 is also available. All semi-annual and annual plans include free personalized tote bags.

q2.question: Am I tied to a minimum duration?
q2.answer: No, the monthly plan has no commitment. You can cancel at any time. The semi-annual and annual plans are billed once for the chosen period.

q3.question: How is my restaurant featured?
q3.answer: Your restaurant appears in search results with a complete profile including photos, menu, opening hours and reviews. Depending on your plan, you benefit from priority display and a verified badge.

q4.question: Is the website available in multiple languages?
q4.answer: Yes, Just-Tag is available in French, German, English, Portuguese and Spanish. Your restaurant profile is translated into all five languages to reach as many customers as possible.

q5.question: What kind of support do you offer?
q5.answer: All plans include email support. Annual and Lifetime plans benefit from dedicated and priority support with a personal advisor.

q6.question: Can I update my profile at any time?
q6.answer: Absolutely. You can update your photos, menu, opening hours and all your information at any time from your dashboard.

problemSolution.title: You have a great restaurant,
problemSolution.titleHighlight: we'll put it in the spotlight.

visibility.title: Invisible online
visibility.text: Your restaurant is lost among thousands on Google. No standout photos, no readable menu, no listing that makes people want to visit. Potential customers scroll right past.

commission.title: Platforms take a commission
commission.text: Commission-based platforms take between 15% and 30% per order or booking. On a CHF 25 dish, you lose up to CHF 7.50. It adds up fast.

reviews.title: Uncontrollable reviews
reviews.text: On generic platforms, anyone can post a review — even someone who has never set foot in your restaurant. And responding is a hassle.

visibility.title: Optimised professional listing
visibility.text: A professional listing optimised for SEO, with your photos, menu and opening hours. You appear in local searches in 5 languages — including for tourists.

commission.title: Zero commission, zero hidden fees
commission.text: Customers contact you directly by phone or email. You only pay a fixed subscription from CHF 24.90/month — you know exactly what it costs.

reviews.title: Verified and moderated reviews
reviews.text: Our reviews are verified and moderated. You can reply to each review from your dashboard. Your rating truly reflects the quality of your cuisine.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: No gimmicks. Practical tools to fill your restaurant.

profile.title: Professional listing

pricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: All plans include the same features. The only difference: the commitment length and the price.
pricing.earlyBirdBannerActive: Launch offer: -40% for the first 100 restaurants. Only {count} spots left. These rates won't come back.
pricing.earlyBirdBannerExpiring: Early Bird offer ending soon. Sign up before it's too late.
pricing.lifetimeDesc: The maths is simple: at CHF 24.90/month, you reach CHF 1,495 in 5 years. With the lifetime offer, you save everything after that. And 500 personalised tote bags (estimated value CHF 2,500) are included.
pricing.contactNote: Not ready? Leave us your number, we'll call you back:

q1.question: What does it actually bring me in concrete terms?
q1.answer: It's hard to promise an exact figure — it depends on your location, cuisine type and average spend. What we do know: restaurants with a complete listing (photos, menu, up-to-date hours) on Just-Tag receive more visits on average than those without. At CHF 24.90/month, just one extra customer per month is enough to recoup your subscription. (Based on an average spend of CHF 30-40 in Western Swiss restaurants.)

q2.question: How do you verify I'm the actual owner?
q2.answer: When you register, you provide your restaurant's name and city. Our team then manually verifies that the information matches before activating your dashboard access. If your restaurant is already in our database, you can claim it directly.

q3.question: Can I cancel whenever I want?
q3.answer: Yes. The monthly plan has no commitment. You cancel from your client area, no questions asked, effective at the end of the current month. Semi-annual and annual plans are billed upfront; if you cancel, your access remains active until the end of the paid period.

q4.question: Do you take a commission on my bookings?
q4.answer: No. Zero commission, zero transaction fees. Customers contact you directly (phone, email). You only pay your monthly, semi-annual or annual subscription. That's it.

q5.question: Who owns my data?
q5.answer: You do. Your photos, menu and texts remain your property. If you cancel, we delete your listing and data. Hosting is in Switzerland, compliant with the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (FADP) and GDPR.

q6.question: What's the difference with commission platforms or generic directories?
q6.answer: Generic directories offer a basic listing: no readable menu, poorly showcased photos, unmoderated reviews. Commission platforms charge 2 to 5 EUR per seated cover. Just-Tag combines a complete professional listing, verified reviews, zero commission and local SEO in 5 languages. All for a predictable fixed price.

q7.question: Can I try for free?
q7.answer: Yes. All plans include a 14-day free trial. You enter your bank details at sign-up (powered by Stripe, fully secure), but you're only charged on day 15. If you cancel before then, zero charges.

q8.question: What happens after the 14 days?
q8.answer: Your subscription starts automatically. You receive a confirmation email with your invoice. If you chose the monthly plan, you can still cancel at any time. If you chose semi-annual or annual, you benefit from the reduced rate for the entire period.
